Patch Set 11:

Hello, Sylvain Desbureaux:

    Please help to confirm the authenticity of the description of the following questions, and help review. Thank you very much.

a, Missing required variable MYSQL_ADDR
   MYSQL_ADDR is no longer required by project

b, kubernetes/modeling/charts/modeling-etsicatalog/templates/deployment.yaml Line 53:
   missing a space here no?

      There are six spaces here.According to our test, the make operation works normally. 
   If we add another or more space, the make operation will report "did not find expected 
   key" error.
      So I think the writing here is correct.
